summary: Full e2e testing of Beauty Parlour Booking App. All requested features are working correctly including frontend compilation, login tabs, support request form, review submission, coupon validation, and admin pages (Settings, Customers, Support). Profile dropdown for logged-in users is functional.

minor.issue: Video create endpoint decorator on line 734 is disconnected from the create_video function which is on line 874. The endpoint may not work.
Duplicate approve_review function on lines 538-545 (dead code without decorator) - should be removed

action_items: Code cleanup: Fix POST /api/videos endpoint - move create_video function to line 735 after the decorator
Code cleanup: Remove duplicate approve_review function on lines 538-545
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 734-735: @api_router.post('/videos') decorator is incomplete - the async function is at line 874, should be right after decorator
server.py lines 538-545: Duplicate approve_review function without decorator (dead code)
seed_data_creation: Created test users, support requests, and reviews via pytest and Playwright tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features working. Backend API tests in /app/backend/tests/test_api.py cover auth, settings, support, customers, coupons, and reviews. Admin panel at /admin/login has sidebar menu with Settings, Customers, Support pages all functional.

backend_tests: Health check - Settings, Services, Staff endpoints accessible
Support request creation and admin retrieval
Coupon validation with date format handling
frontend_tests: Login page with Email/Phone tabs switching
Homepage review submission form at bottom
Admin Settings page loads and has all inputs
Admin Customers page shows customer list with reset password option
Admin Support page shows support requests
Profile dropdown menu for logged-in users in navbar
